title: <div><tt>| P15     | vertical &lt&gt horizontal &amp compress &lt&gt expand | ma
content:
| P15 | vertical <> horizontal & compress <> expand | male/female | archetype selector |
| P16 | finite <> infinite & solo <> group | enabled/disabled | function switch |
| P17 | active <> passive & opacity <> clarity | awake/asleep | user engagement |
| P18 | stable <> shifting & rigid <> fluid | clean/corrupt | system integrity |
| P19 | front <> back & ritual <> accident | safe/unsafe | recursion gate |
| P20 | ego <> mask & archive <> erasure | high/low | volume logic |
| P21 | gravity <> levity & auto <> improv | accept/reject | decision fork |
| P22 | harmony <> chaos & sync <> drift | sync/desync | timing lock |
| P23 | solar <> lunar & awake <> dreaming | active/inactive | AI thread toggle |
| P24 | scarce <> plenty & vertical <> cyclical | logged/out | memory state |
